en: Hello everyone. Here we go.
A: Please sit down.

ab: sabau makanaelre. kaiasaa aibulruaku numiya ikai akanea ku vaga ki Ngudradrekai tumana luiya.
ch: 大家好。今天老師要教大家食物的魯凱語怎麼說。
en: Hello everyone. Today, I’m going to teach you how to say the Rukai word for food.

ab: wathingale su kilalra kai taiya ki singsi?
en: A: Do you understand what the teacher says?

ab: singsi, kadruwa ka wathingale. aidulru su pela ?
ch: B:老師，我不懂。可以再說一次嗎?
en: B: I don’t understand. Can you repeat it again?

ab: kadruwa ka makakyalalra, aidulru su akwadradrau ?
ch: B:我聽不到，可以大聲一點嗎?
en: B: I can’t hear you, can you speak louder?

ch: 請看這裡! 跟著我唸一遍。
en: Look here, please! Repeat after me.
It’s very well read.
Read it again. Please speak louder.
Please be quiet. Don’t talk.
A: Please take out your textbook.
B: Yes, sir.
A: Please take out your pen.
B: I forgot to bring my pen.
A: Please take out the eraser.

ab: singsi, mahimuha ku iluku ku sasupisupilra.
en: B: I forgot to bring my eraser.

ab: kisalrua inya thili su ku sasupisupilra.
ch: A:請跟旁邊同學借橡皮擦。
en: A: Please borrow erasers from your classmates.
B: Can I borrow your eraser?
Class is over.

ab: ta pakeakela ikai, kibulru, ta macecelenga lu pela ki takibulrubulrua.
ch: 我們就上到這邊，下週再見。
en: Class dismissed, see you next week.
